'''Natara''' was a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], serving in [[Sector Command (Alliance)/Legends|Sector Command]]. General [[Trep Reskan]] of the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] reported the completion of [[Oracle Base]] to Natara.
